name: Build + test after editing types.ts
action: Run npm run build / tsc / vitest after editing scripts/lib/types.ts — ripple risk across consumers

name: Schema check after editing state-store.ts
action: Run db-health-check or vitest after editing scripts/lib/state-store.ts

name: /doks after editing agent definition
action: Run /doks after editing any .claude/agents/*.md to keep catalogs in sync

name: /doks after editing skill definition
action: Run /doks after editing any .claude/skills/*.md to keep catalogs in sync

name: /doks after editing command definition
action: Run /doks after editing any .claude/commands/*.md to keep catalogs in sync

name: vitest after editing hook script
action: Run vitest after editing .claude/hooks/scripts/*.js to catch hook regressions

name: Skill creation must use skill-creator
action: All skill creation or editing MUST go through skill-creator:skill-creator plugin

name: /doks after editing CLAUDE.md
action: Run /doks after editing CLAUDE.md to catch drift vs code reality

name: /forge --dry-run after editing pattern-definitions.json
action: Sanity-check the learning engine's own input with /forge --dry-run before shipping

name: npm install + almanak after editing package.json
action: After editing package.json, run npm install and look up dependency changes via /almanak

name: npm run build after editing types.ts
action: Run npm run build after editing scripts/lib/types.ts so lifecycle hooks pick up the new compiled types from dist/

name: Consecutive Edit cluster — consider checkpoint
action: When editing 3+ files in a row, consider /chekpoint to gate review before going further

name: mypy + pytest after editing Python types module
action: Run mypy and pytest after editing types.py — ripple risk across consumers (Python parallel to types.ts pattern; plan-020 Phase D)

name: pytest after editing Python data access module
action: Run pytest after editing models.py — data layer changes need the integration suite (Python parallel to state-store.ts pattern; plan-020 Phase D)

name: pip install + almanak after editing pyproject.toml
action: After editing pyproject.toml, run pip install (or uv/poetry install) and look up version changes via /almanak (Python parallel to package.json pattern; plan-020 Phase D)
